mnemonics.title: Process States
mnemonics.content: NEW READY RUNNING WAITING TERMINATED - THINK OF NATIONS AT WAR: NEW RECRUITS TRAIN, THEN SERVE, THEN REST, THEN GO HOME (N-R-W-W-T)

mnemonics.title: PCB Components
mnemonics.content: PROCESS MEMORY ACCOUNTING I/O STATE SCHEDULING INFO - USE: P M A I O S S I (PM_AIOSI)

mnemonics.title: Scheduling Criteria
mnemonics.content: THROUGHPUT TURNAROUND WAITING RESPONSE UTILIZATION CPU BURST - THINK: T T W R U C B (TWIST)

acronyms.usage: Data structure storing all process information
Scheduling algorithm that prioritizes shortest burst time
Scheduling algorithm that serves in order of arrival
Same as FCFS, also a page replacement algorithm

visualTips.visualization: DRAW A CIRCLE WITH 5 STATIONS: NEW -> (admission) -> READY -> (dispatch) -> RUNNING -> (preempt/quantum expire) -> READY; RUNNING -> (I/O request) -> WAITING -> (I/O complete) -> READY; RUNNING -> (exit) -> TERMINATED; DRAW ARROWS WITH LABELS FOR EACH TRANSITION

IMAGINE A FILE FOLDER WITH 4 DIVIDERS: IDENTIFICATION (PID, PPID), STATE (current state, reason), CONTROLS (PC, registers, priority), RESOURCES (memory map, open files). EACH PROCESS HAS ITS OWN FOLDER IN THE OS CABINET.
PICTURE TWO PEOPLE PASSING A STICK (CPU). EACH PERSON HAS A NOTEBOOK (PCB) WITH THEIR PROGRESS. SWITCHING = SAVE YOUR NOTES, PASS STICK, READ OTHER'S NOTES. FAST BUT NOT FREE - IT TAKES TIME.

analogies.analogy: PROGRAM IS LIKE A RECIPE WRITTEN ON PAPER (PASSIVE), PROCESS IS LIKE SOMEONE COOKING USING THAT RECIPE (ACTIVE). SAME RECIPE CAN BE USED BY MULTIPLE COOKS (PROCESSES) AT ONCE.
LIKE A TEACHER MARKING PAPERS: SAVE CURRENT STUDENT'S PROGRESS, PUT IT BACK IN QUEUE, PICK NEXT STUDENT'S WORK, CONTINUE MARKING. EACH STUDENT'S WORK = A PROCESS.
A SINGLE PUBLIC RESTROOM (SHARED RESOURCE). ONLY ONE PERSON CAN USE IT AT A TIME. THE RULES POSTED ARE THE MUTUAL EXCLUSION REQUIREMENTS.
LIKE A CHILD WHO LEFT HOME (TERMINATED) BUT PARENT STILL HAS BIRTH CERTIFICATE (PROCESS TABLE ENTRY). PARENT MUST ACKNOWLEDGE (CALL WAIT) TO CLOSE THE RECORD.
A CHILD WHOSE PARENTS DIED. IN UNIX, THE ORPHAN GETS ADOPTED BY INIT (THE GRANDPARENT OF ALL PROCESSES) WHICH BECOMES ITS NEW PARENT.
PROCESS IS LIKE A HOUSE (OWN ADDRESS SPACE), THREAD IS LIKE A PERSON LIVING IN THE HOUSE (SHARES HOUSE WITH OTHERS). MULTIPLE THREADS = MULTIPLE PEOPLE SHARING SAME HOUSE.
